svg.title: Golden Rectangle — Five Levels
svg.desc:
Five levels of square-cutting, each contained within its own remaining rectangle. phi = 1.6180339887
Outer rectangle: left=101, top=215, right=700, bottom=585 (width=599, height=370)
Level 1: cut square (side=370) from LEFT Square 1: x=101..471, y=215..585 Remaining: x=471..700, y=215..585 (width=229, height=370) Line: x=471, y=215 to y=585
Level 2: cut square (side=229) from TOP of remaining Square 2: x=471..700, y=215..444 Remaining: x=471..700, y=444..585 (width=229, height=141) Line: y=444, x=471 to x=700
Level 3: cut square (side=141) from RIGHT of remaining Square 3: x=559..700, y=444..585 Remaining: x=471..559, y=444..585 (width=88, height=141) Line: x=559, y=444 to y=585
Level 4: cut square (side=88) from BOTTOM of remaining Square 4: x=471..559, y=497..585 Remaining: x=471..559, y=444..497 (width=88, height=53) Line: y=497, x=471 to x=559
Level 5: cut square (side=53) from LEFT of remaining Square 5: x=471..524, y=444..497 Remaining: x=524..559, y=444..497 (width=35, height=53) Line: x=524, y=444 to y=497
